---
name: "E1 — Runtime Kernel Foundation"
about: Establish the runtime-first foundation for durable orchestration control.
title: "E1: Runtime Kernel Foundation"
labels: ["epic", "E1", "TH3"]
---

## Goal

Establish the minimum runtime-first foundation: runtime mode, durable run-state extensions, controller lifecycle, and explicit operator controls.

## User Stories

- [ ] TH3.E1.US1 — Runtime mode decision spike
- [ ] TH3.E1.US2 — Persisted run state and wake record model
- [ ] TH3.E1.US3 — Background controller lifecycle
- [ ] TH3.E1.US4 — Pause and manual override controls

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A baseline runtime mode is selected for VP3
- [ ] Durable wake, lease, and policy records are defined additively
- [ ] Controller lifecycle is explicit for start, sleep, resume, and shutdown
- [ ] Operator pause and override actions remain explicit and auditable
